## Existing Core Sets

- Polyglot test pipeline agents
- Security/DevOps/technical-writing specialist agents
- Planning/debug/janitor and custom-agent authoring agents

## Notes

- Source: github/awesome-copilot (selected subset).
- Files are stored under github/.github so they stow into ~/.github.
- For the complete current list, see [../agents](../agents).
